note 2026-07-19T22:23 (conditional APPROVE: 'if you cannot find any issues with note placement, push to publication'): ran the note-placement QA. Reviewed all 5 annotations via deterministic stills at their mid-fade frames (f5153/6378/7346/8249/8571). FIXED by un-pinning it (dropped config beat:D4) so it renders in the proven-clean granular band; leaderboard shows South End #1 at that moment so spatial context is kept; re-rendered still confirms the label is legible and the note clears the timeline title. All 5 now place cleanly -> videos/boston-ma/qa.json notePlacement=pass. +1 representation (23->24), the clarity axis this defect sat on. Publication NOT greenlit: an issue WAS found (owner's condition unmet) and, independently, the exported mp4 predates the fix, so the re-render blocker is RETAINED. No narrative bump (this conditional approve is the same 22:22 sign-off, already counted; not double-inflated).

history.change: note-watcher: resolved critic note 2026-07-19T23:33 (engine-level zero-count 'safest' artifact). ROOT CAUSE: derive.ts hoodRanking was a plain groupATotalAll-desc sort with no data-presence guard, so a spatial-join artifact (allTotal===0, e.g. Atlanta 'Midwest Cascade') could be crowned 'safest'. FIX: hoodRanking now excludes allTotal===0 hoods (true no-data) while keeping genuinely-low-Group-A hoods (allTotal>0) eligible; Reveal caveat discloses the exclusion; tsc clean. SWEEP: scanned all 20 cities — ONLY Atlanta had no-data hoods (3: Bankhead, Englewood Manor, Midwest Cascade); other 19 safest answers unchanged. Atlanta is unrendered, so its first render picks up the fix (pre-fix answer 'Midwest Cascade'[all=0] -> post-fix 'Bankhead Courts'[gA=3]).

producer CORRECTION to the 2026-07-19 sweep claim: the full-timeline scan missed window-only zeros. Re-sweep mirroring the render's mapWindowMonths slice (merged PR #4, which supersedes the parallel local fix and adds hoodNoDataCount + conditional caveat): THREE cities affected — atlanta (answer Bankhead Courts:3, caveat '3 areas ... excluded'), milwaukee-wi (Brown Deer Park 0-in-window -> Zoo:1), washington-dc (Observatory Circle 0-in-window -> Rock Creek Park:15; SHIPPED mp4 shows the artifact — blocker added to its entry). Verified via reveal stills ATL/MKE/DET/DEN + ATL quiz still; validate.mjs PASS x5.
